name: Coveralls Open Source Program
description: Free forever code coverage tracking for open source projects with support for C/C++, Go, Java, JavaScript, Python, Ruby, PHP, .NET, and more.

perks.title: Free Code Coverage
perks.description: Unlimited code coverage tracking for all public repositories with no time limits.

perks.title: Multi-Language Support
perks.description: Supports C/C++, Go, Java, JavaScript/Node, Python, Ruby/Rails, PHP, .NET, and many more.

perks.title: Unlimited Users
perks.description: All plans include unlimited users with instant sign-up through GitHub, Bitbucket, and GitLab.

eligibility: Must be an open source project with a public repository on GitHub, GitLab, or Bitbucket.
applicationProcess: Sign up at coveralls.io with your GitHub, Bitbucket, or GitLab account.
Public repositories are automatically free forever — no credit card required.
